summary: CRITICAL BUG FIXED: /join onboarding flow was crashing with 'Oops! Something went wrong' error due to a race condition when users clicked soul question options rapidly. The bug occurred because setTimeout callbacks could increment currentQuestion past array bounds (beyond index 12 for 13 questions), causing SOUL_QUESTIONS[currentQuestion] to be undefined and throwing 'Cannot read properties of undefined (reading icon)'. Fix implemented: Added isTransitioningRef guard and bounds checking in renderSoulScreen.

minor.issue: Returns 405 - endpoint not implemented. This is expected behavior as the breed selector fallback works correctly.

critical_code_review_comments: FIXED: Race condition in handleSoulAnswer - setTimeout could fire multiple times when clicking rapidly, causing currentQuestion to exceed SOUL_QUESTIONS.length
FIXED: Added bounds checking in renderSoulScreen to prevent accessing undefined array index
FIXED: Added isTransitioningRef guard to prevent multiple rapid clicks from double-advancing
seed_data_creation: Test users and pets created during testing
context_for_next_testing_agent: The /join onboarding flow is now working correctly including all 13 soul questions with multi-select support. The race condition bug that caused 'Oops! Something went wrong' error when clicking rapidly has been fixed. The fix added: 1) isTransitioningRef guard to prevent rapid clicks on single-select questions, 2) Bounds checking in renderSoulScreen to handle edge cases. Backend APIs all working - /api/membership/onboard creates users and pets correctly, /api/auth/login works for new accounts, /api/pets/my-pets returns pets.

bug_rca.root_cause: Race condition in handleSoulAnswer function. When user clicks on a single-select answer option, a 1500ms setTimeout is scheduled to auto-advance to next question. If user clicks rapidly (especially on multi-select Continue button), multiple callbacks could fire and increment currentQuestion beyond SOUL_QUESTIONS.length - 1 (index 12). This caused SOUL_QUESTIONS[13] to be undefined.
bug_rca.error_message: TypeError: Cannot read properties of undefined (reading 'icon') at renderSoulScreen
bug_rca.trigger_condition: Rapid clicking through soul questions, especially clicking on answers before the 1500ms auto-advance timer completes
fix_applied: Added isTransitioningRef = useRef(false) to track if auto-advance timer is pending
Added guard in handleSoulAnswer for single-select: if (isTransitioningRef.current) return
Set isTransitioningRef.current = true before setTimeout, reset to false inside setTimeout callback
Added bounds check at start of renderSoulScreen: if (currentQuestion >= SOUL_QUESTIONS.length) redirect to payoff

flows_tested.complete_onboarding_flow: PASS - Photo upload -> Breed selection -> Gender -> Name -> Birthday -> Parent info -> 13 Soul questions -> Payoff -> Account creation -> Auto-login -> Navigate to pet-home
flows_tested.rapid_clicking_edge_case: PASS (after fix) - Previously crashed with error boundary, now handles rapid clicks gracefully
flows_tested.multi_select_questions: PASS - Questions 4 (food_allergies), 7 (health_conditions), 13 (main_goal) work correctly with Continue button
flows_tested.duplicate_email_rejection: PASS - Returns 'Email already registered. Please login.'
flows_tested.login_after_onboard: PASS - New users can login immediately after account creation
flows_tested.pet_data_persistence: PASS - Pet data correctly stored in database with soul answers
